channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Best Dyson Deals for Prime Day: Vacuums, Hair Tools, and More (2026)
item.description: It's one of the best times to snag yourself a Dyson device, whether it's a vacuum or a beauty tool.

item.title: Best Prime Day Tech Deals Offer Up to $280 Off (2026): Phones, Watches, and More
item.description: Don't pay full price—snag one of these tasty Prime Day tech deals on some of our favorite WIRED-tested gadgets.

item.title: Get ready for Warhammer 40,000 11th Edition with these Prime Day Warhammer deals on paints, brushes, models & more
item.description: Prime Day? More like Primaris Day, as you can save a fortune on getting started with Warhammer 40,000 11th Edition.

item.title: Best Red-Light Therapy Mask: WIRED's Top 5, Ranked (2026)
item.description: Your face called, and it’s low-key offended you might trust TikTok more than WIRED.

item.title: The discontinued reMarkable 2 is selling fast on Amazon, but should you buy the new Paper Pure instead? Here’s how the two writing tablets compare, according to the man who designed them
item.description: The six-year-old reMarkable 2 is the top-selling writing tablet this Prime Day — here’s how it differs from the new reMarkable Paper Pure.

item.title: Buying an iPad this Prime Day? Don't spend money before you're sure which model you need — here are my recommendations for students, streamers, and more
item.description: We round up the best Prime Day iPad deals and highlight the right model for every use case.

item.title: I've tested the best Bose Bluetooth speakers on the market — here are the 3 Prime Day deals I'd spend my money on
item.description: I've tested the very best Bose Bluetooth speakers around, and these are the ones I'd recommend above all.

item.title: Prime Day is your chance to stock up on 4th of July must-haves — shop decor, party supplies, and grilling gear from $5.99
item.description: Prime Day is the perfect opportunity to stock up and save on 4th of July must-haves, and I'm rounding up my favorite deals on party supplies, decor, grilling gear, and more.

item.title: The Best Fake Christmas Trees on the Market Are 50% Off for Prime Day (2026)
item.description: Save big during Prime Day on the best fake Christmas trees you can buy if you’re willing to stash them for six months.

item.title: Best Prime Day Vacuum Deals Offer Up to 42% Off (2026): Shark, Dyson, Bissell
item.description: Move over, spring cleaning. These vacuum deals will give your home the cleanest summer yet thanks to Amazon Prime Day.

item.title: The 7 best tablets of 2026: Comparing iPad, Samsung, and Lenovo
item.description: See how the new M4 iPad Air compares to the best tablets from Lenovo, Samsung, Microsoft, and Amazon Fire.

item.title: Jalapeño is the first AI chip from OpenAI and Broadcom
item.description: It's a spicy start for the AI company's collaboration with the chip maker.

item.title: Companies are scrambling to stop employees from maxing out AI budgets with small tasks
item.description: The tokenmaxxing era was brief. We now appear to be entering the era of token rationing.

item.title: Some Microsoft Surface devices just got big price cuts — but the catch is they've had big RAM cuts, too
item.description: Microsoft has dropped the RAM to 8GB with new entry-level models, prompting questions over whether that's enough memory.

item.title: Dozens died at Camp Mystic last summer. Now the Texas campground has filed for bankruptcy
item.description: A recent state investigation found Camp Mystic negligent in emergency preparedness after a flooding disaster claimed 28 lives. On July 4, 2025, 28 people died in a catastrophic flood at Camp Mystic, an all-girls Christian summer camp in Texas. Two teenage counselors, 25 campers, and the camp’s co-executive director all died in the disaster, being trapped in floodwater when the nearby Guadalupe River reached a height of 37 feet in only an hour....

item.title: How to watch Morocco vs. Haiti online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Morocco vs. Haiti in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to watch Scotland vs. Brazil online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Scotland vs. Brazil in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to watch South Africa vs. South Korea online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream South Africa vs. South Korea in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Cool off with these 10 summer deals
item.description: Stay cool this summer by saving 35% on a Yeti cooler, over 30% on cooling Brooklinen sheets, and 40% off a Cusinart ice cream maker.

item.title: Best Prime Day Deals I've Found on Window and Portable Air Conditioners (2026)
item.description: Window ACs and portable air conditioners are on great Prime Day deals. Get some, uh, cool prices.

item.title: I've become obsessed with my Owala water bottle — and it's 26% off for Prime Day
item.description: The Owala FreeSip Sway combines a clever straw-and-spout design and a cupholder-friendly build, and it's now up to 26% off for Prime Day.

item.title: The World Cup’s latest viral trend is surprisingly wholesome
item.description: World Cup 2026 teams and fans from Japan, Jordan, and Iran are going viral for clean locker rooms, thank-you notes, and postgame courtesy.

item.title: Crise de la RAM : Octave Klaba annonce de nouvelles hausses de prix chez OVHcloud
item.description: Octave Klaba reprend la parole sur la crise de la RAM. Le patron d'OVHcloud annonce de nouvelles hausses de prix dès cet été, et confirme que la facture du cloud va continuer de grimper jusqu'en 2028.

item.title: Everyone is a builder now
item.description: AI tools have widened the ability to create new functionalities and new companies. When a natural disaster hits or a political crisis breaks out, you need to know where your employees are and reach them fast. We were paying $60,000 a year for a third-party tool to handle that. It didn’t fully work.

item.title: Google Play : la commission de 30 % est officiellement morte
item.description: Google découpe sa commission sur le Play Store en deux et parle de « frais plus bas ». En réalité, pour la plupart des développeurs, l’addition finale ne bouge presque pas.

item.title: Congresswoman denies staff used AI to write defense funding amendment
item.description: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna (R-FL) says her staff used AI for "spellcheck" in an amendment summary for a major defense bill, but denies it was used for the bill text itself and says "NO Legislation is ever drafted with AI." Luna issued the response after accounts on X began sharing screenshots of an amendment summary […]

item.title: AWS pipped AMD and Intel to the first CPU supporting PCIe 6.0, and you can now finally rent it by the hour (but don't expect any miracles)
item.description: AWS has launched Graviton5 with PCIe 6.0 support, although supporting hardware capable of exploiting it remains scarce.

item.title: ‘Who cares about GTA 6?’ I’m not bitter about the lack of a PC version, and neither will you be with these great gaming laptops
item.description: Forget GTA 6, the PC is the best place to play (other) games, and these Prime Day gaming laptop deals prove my point.

item.title: A popular password manager was hit by a hack. What you need to know—and how to keep your data safe
item.description: LastPass has been affected by the recent data breach of market intelligence platform Klue, which compromised sensitive customer details. LastPass, a password manager maker, is informing customers of a recent security breach at third-party market intelligence platform Klue, and how it impacts its customers, according to a recent blog post.

item.title: Here’s why Slate changed the battery in its cheap EV truck
item.description: While there was probably a moment when Slate’s leadership had to green-light the switch from one battery type to another, the momentum toward that decision had been building for years.

item.title: These two simple sub-£25 purchases have made a huge difference for me (and my car) during the heatwave in the UK this week
item.description: One keeps my car cool, the other keeps me cool — and they're both on sale

item.title: Every Time Norway Scores at the World Cup the City of Bergen Trembles
item.description: This curious phenomenon was documented by the seismometer at the University of Bergen, which recorded slight vibrations whenever the national team scored a goal.

item.title: Almost every single SteelSeries headset is discounted right now, and you just can't miss with any of them
item.description: The incredible SteelSeries Arctis Nova Elite is on offer in the UK right now, alongside a host of discounts across the brand's excellent headsets in the US and UK

item.title: Alibaba's model never trained as an agent — and improved agent performance across seven benchmarks
item.description: Alibaba's Qwen team released Qwen-AgentWorld on Tuesday — two models trained not to act inside agent environments, but to predict what those environments return. The release covers seven domains under a single architecture: MCP, Search, Terminal, Software Engineering, Android, Web, and OS. The release extends Alibaba's recent push into autonomous agents. Qwen3.7-Max, released in May, was built around a 35-hour autonomous execution capability. That shift targets a ceiling teams training agents at scale run into directly. Real search engines surface whatever results exist, with no mechanism to i...

item.title: We swept Amazon and Walmart for the best Prime Day Lego deals: Shop flower bouquets, Star Wars, 50+ more
item.description: We found 30+ Prime Day Lego deals at Amazon and 20+ more at Walmart. Popular Fortnite, NASA, Star Wars, and Botanical sets are on sale.

item.title: Get Up to 36% Off With the Best Prime Day Kindle Deals (2026): Paperwhite, Colorsoft, Kids
item.description: There’s no better time to get a Kindle than during Amazon's own sale event.

item.title: Pas de GTA Online au lancement de GTA 6 ? La stratégie calculée de Rockstar
item.description: GTA 6 ne sera pas jouable en ligne dès sa sortie le 19 novembre 2026. Les joueurs devront patienter avant de découvrir les évolutions de GTA Online.

item.title: How to watch Morocco vs Haiti: Free Streams & TV Channels online from anywhere for FIFA World Cup 2026, team news
item.description: Ayoub El Kaabi leads the line for Morocco against Haiti in the FIFA World Cup 2026. Here's how to watch the Group C clash for free online and from anywhere, as the Atlas Lions hunt top spot.

item.title: How to watch Scotland vs Brazil: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time for FIFA World Cup 2026 as Steve Clarke's side face date with destiny, team news
item.description: Ben Gannon-Doak returns to the starting lineup as Scotland face Brazil at the FIFA World Cup 2026. Here's how to watch the Group C fixture for free online and from anywhere, as both teams eye a place in the last-32.

item.title: Make the switch from Apple Watch this Prime Day — here are the best deals we've found on our favorite Wear OS models from Samsung to Google
item.description: We're gathering all the best Wear OS deals from Samsung, Google, and more this Prime Day

item.title: AI traffic cameras spark backlash in Mississippi — as government officials try to calm fears they’ll be used to catch motorists who are speeding, not wearing seatbelts or texting at the wheel
item.description: Government officials in Mississippi have been attempting to calm fears that new AI traffic cameras will become a massive privacy violation.

item.title: A hidden retirement gap is costing women more than $5,000 a year
item.description: Women collect an average of $5,254 less in Social Security each year than men, a gap experts say begins with decades of unequal earnings. The future looks grim for people who rely on Social Security income in retirement. The program is barreling toward running out of funds by 2032 unless Congress intervenes, and women in particular stand to lose if that doesn’t happen....

item.title: GameStop CEO says goodbye to $35 billion pay package to focus on eBay bid
item.description: Ryan Cohen won’t receive a potential performance reward from GameStop to concentrate on plans to acquire eBay, even after the commerce giant rejected his proposal. In May, GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen surprised the masses after announcing an unsolicited offer to buy eBay for nearly $56 billion—a deal that eBay’s board rejected and called “neither credible nor attractive.” ...

item.title: The best cordless power tool deals on Prime Day: Save on Craftsman, DeWalt, Hoto, and more
item.description: Save on cordless power tools at Amazon from Craftsman, DeWalt, Hoto, and more during Prime Day.
